items.title: xerrors/Yuxi-Know
items.content:
结合LightRAG 知识库的知识图谱智能体平台。 An agent platform that integrates a LightRAG knowledge base and knowledge graphs. Build with LangChain v1 + Vue + FastAPI, support DeepAgents、MinerU PDF、Neo4j 、MCP.

Language: Python
Stars: 3452
Forks: 419
items.contentSnippet:
结合LightRAG 知识库的知识图谱智能体平台。 An agent platform that integrates a LightRAG knowledge base and knowledge graphs. Build with LangChain v1 + Vue + FastAPI, support DeepAgents、MinerU PDF、Neo4j 、MCP. 
Language: Python 
Stars: 3452 
Forks: 419
items.creator: xerrors
items.summary: Xerrors/Yuxi-Know是一个基于LightRAG知识库的智能体平台，整合知识图谱技术。该平台使用LangChain v1、Vue和FastAPI构建，支持DeepAgents、MinerU PDF、Neo4j和MCP，主要编程语言为Python。平台在GitHub上获得3452星和419次分叉。
